summary:
The brain has a well-developed structure at birth, with major anatomical components fully forming by the end of pregnancy, although it undergoes significant postnatal growth. In contrast, the face remains underdeveloped at birth due to continued bone remodeling processes that extend beyond infancy.  

Final Answer: \boxed{C}

In contrast, the face remains underdeveloped at birth due to continued bone remodeling processes that extend beyond infancy.  

Final Answer: \boxed{C}. Answer choice: B
